questions.question: What New England state is the fitting site for the town of Teaticket?
Who played a recurring character on MacGyver named Penny Parker before landing a lead in her own series?
What country lost 17.2 percent of its population in World War II?
What do you call a substance containing only one kind of atom?
What footballer, after running 64 yards in the wrong direction, was reoriented by teammate Benny Lom?
What televangelist noted: "You don't have to be dowdy to be a Christian"?
